texto: So many times the debate of abortion turns to legality. The issue is not legality, the issue is morality. Have you not forgotten? It was legal for Adolf Hitler to place all of those men, women, and children in concentration camps and murder them. Abortion should never be an issue of legality, it is most definitely an issue of morality.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Derrick Sanderson que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “So many times the debate of abortion turns to legality. The issue is not legality, the issue is m…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, abortion, hitler, com foco em hitler e legality.
